title: pelargonium × virgatum
intro: Pelargonium × virgatum, also known as the climbing rose-scented geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the geranium family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in herbal remedies for soothing digestive issues and reducing stress. The health benefits of Pelargonium × virgatum include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and skin irritations. Herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and essential oils can be made from the plant's leaves and flowers, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
